Class NaiveBayesClassifier

java.lang.Object
com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.NaiveBayesClassifier
public final class NaiveBayesClassifier extends Object
Multinomial Naive Bayes classifier — pure Java, zero external dependencies.

Mathematical Foundation

For a feature vector x = (x₁, …, xₙ) and class c:

  P(c | x) ∝ P(c) · ∏ P(xᵢ | c)

All probabilities are stored in log-space to avoid floating-point underflow on long feature vectors:

  log P(c | x) ∝ log P(c) + Σ log P(xᵢ | c)

Laplace smoothing (α = 1.0) is applied during training to handle features that appear in test data but were absent from training.

Usage

NaiveBayesClassifier clf = new NaiveBayesClassifier();
clf.train("PII",    List.of("contact", "john", "at", "555"));
clf.train("BENIGN", List.of("i", "ate", "an", "apple"));
clf.finalize(); // must call before predict()

String label = clf.predict(List.of("email", "alice", "at", "acme"));
double[] probs = clf.predictProba(List.of("email", "alice", "at", "acme"));
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Hemant Naik

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    NaiveBayesClassifier()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    finalizeFit()
    Finalises training: computes log-priors and log-likelihoods with Laplace smoothing.
    List<String>
    getClasses()
    Returns the ordered list of class labels that correspond to the probability array returned by predictProba(List).
    boolean
    isFitted()
    Returns whether the classifier has been fitted.
    String
    predict(List<String> features)
    Returns the most likely class label for the given features.
    double[]
    predictProba(List<String> features)
    Returns a probability distribution over all classes for the given features.
    void
    train(String label, List<String> features)
    Adds one training example.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • NaiveBayesClassifier

      public NaiveBayesClassifier()

  • Method Details

    • train

      public void train(String label, List<String> features)
      Adds one training example.
      Parameters:
      label - the class label (e.g. "PII", "BENIGN")
      features - list of string features (bag-of-words tokens)

    • finalizeFit

      public void finalizeFit()
      Finalises training: computes log-priors and log-likelihoods with Laplace smoothing. Must be called exactly once before predict(List).

    • predict

      public String predict(List<String> features)
      Returns the most likely class label for the given features.
      Parameters:
      features - the feature tokens (bag-of-words)
      Returns:
      the winning class label
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if finalizeFit() has not been called

    • predictProba

      public double[] predictProba(List<String> features)
      Returns a probability distribution over all classes for the given features. Probabilities are normalised via log-sum-exp.
      Parameters:
      features - the feature tokens (bag-of-words)
      Returns:
      array of probabilities, in the same order as getClasses()

    • getClasses

      public List<String> getClasses()
      Returns the ordered list of class labels that correspond to the probability array returned by predictProba(List).

    • isFitted

      public boolean isFitted()
      Returns whether the classifier has been fitted.
